user_feedback_items.request: Write SC001 layout.yaml with fixed dimensions, wall, gate, gatehouse, bell, flags, attack direction, character positions, and shot cameras
Use Blender to build SC001 blockout scene
Export top view, camera map, shot guides, depth, lineart from same Blender scene
Audit whether the four storyboards come from the same space
Send these images to ComfyUI / image generation tool for keyframes
If masks, faces, or props need correction, send to Krita/GIMP

next_unblock_actions: Install Blender or provide the Blender executable path.
Configure ComfyUI server, checkpoint, workflow template, and node bindings.
Generate candidates under 01/assets/director-room/shots/*/candidates/ without overwriting canonical reference frames.
Run Krita/GIMP only after keyframe candidates or masks exist.
